productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Black Backpack
description: Talk about style and space rolled into one, and there's no better bag you can find than this one from united colors of benetton. Neatly designed with lots of organiser space and a laptop compartment, this backpack makes for a great everyday option to take to college or the office.Length: 45 cmWidth: 30 cmDepth: 17 cmMade of polyester with a nylon lining for durability, toughness and easy cleaningBranded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bagOne main zippered compartment with padded laptop compartment, organiser pouches and a zippered mesh pouchOne pocket on the front with a zipper closureOne zippered compartment on the side with a padded laptop holderSynthetic haul loop for handling easeAdjustable, detachable shoulder strap to convert backpack into a laptop bagWide, adjustable handles and padded back for carrying ease and to protect the shoulders and back from injuriesCareHand washClean with a damp cloth when necessaryDo not dry clean or machine wash, tumble dry, wring or line dry
